subject: Urgent Request: Kotlin Developer – Kotlin – Fintech
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Payloop (fintech) is looking for a mid Kotlin Developer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (remote)
• Rate: up to 825 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Kotlin
• Oracle

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Marcus Holm
IT Recruitment Specialist
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 70 234 56 78
